description:
In this step, you will create student groups (sections) such as Class 11 Science - A, Class 11 Science - B, or any other subdivision of a program.

Student Groups are used to organize students within a program into smaller manageable batches. Each group can be assigned instructors and is used for attendance tracking, timetable scheduling, and class-specific academic activities.

While creating a student group:
- Link it to a specific Program (Class)
- Assign one or more instructors responsible for that section
- Define the academic year for proper structuring

Student Groups help in managing parallel sections within the same program and are essential for generating accurate timetables and routine planning.
name: Create Student Groups (Sections)
title: Section Setup
